author: holgerd77
content:
Hey everyone, there was some funding "coming out of nowhere" (Bankr, we'll see how reliable this will be, but some promising start) for feelyourprotocol.org, so I'll be able to continue to build stuff here! 😊

Yesterday I've set up a protocol exploration around Amsterdam **EIP-8024**, showing the behavior of the new DUPN/SWAPN/EXCHANGE opcodes and also include some gimmicks like **immediate calculators** and stuff:
https://feelyourprotocol.org/eip-8024-stack-opcodes-dupn-swapn-exchange

I would really and honestly value some feedback especially of you (everyone reading here!) guys what kind of tooling/experimentation would additionally be helpful around Glamsterdam EIPs and what EIP to tackle next! 🙏 (for contact you'll find out how!).

author: parithosh
content: Thank you for trying out the new time for the ACDC call! If we decide to more permanently change the call time, we'll announce it in a future call BEFORE making the change. So ACDC #181 will occur at the usual scheduled time.

author: .paulharris
content: I appreciate trying the alternate time!
